content.query:
SELECT
[_campaign_id] as CampaignID
,[_account_id] as AccountID
,[_campagin_name] as CampaignName
,[_bid_strategy] as BidStrategy
,[_objective] as Objective
,[_buying_type] as BuyingType
,[_can_use_spend_cap] as CanUseSpendCap
,[_smart_promotion_type] as SmartPromotionType
,[_status] as Status
,[_effective_status] as EffectiveStatus
,[_budget_rebalance_flag] as BudgetRebalanceFlag
,[_special_ad_category] as SpecialAdCateogry
,[_configured_status] as ConfiguredStatus
,[_created_time] as CreatedTime
,[_start_time] as StartTime
,[_stop_time] as StopTime
,[_updated_time] as UpdatedTime
,[_lifetime_budget] as LifetimeBudget
,[_budget_remaining] as BudgetRemaining
,[_topline_id] as ToplineID
,[_source_campaign_id] as SourceCampaignID
,[_is_skadnetwork_attribution] as IsSKADNetworkAttribution
,[_can_create_brand_lift_study] as CanCreateBrandLiftStudy
 FROM [RIVERY].[fb_ads_campaigns]
